known_issues: Deployment error when going live on Internet Computer network - compilation error in generated code

existing_features.title: Verify that the Add Customer and Add Cattle form submission bug fixes (which call backend mutations and update the UI without a page reload) are preserved and working correctly after the compilation fix.

new_feature_requests.summary: Identify and fix the Motoko compilation error in backend/main.mo that is preventing successful deployment to the Internet Computer network. Ensure the actor compiles cleanly with no type errors, missing imports, or syntax issues.

projectName: Fix compilation error causing production deployment failure
